title: Global Stylesheet
content:
This file defines the global CSS variables and styles for the DocMed application, leveraging Tailwind CSS.

## Purpose

- **Theming:** Establishes a consistent color palette, typography, and spacing system using CSS variables.
- **Utility Classes:** Integrates with Tailwind CSS for rapid UI development.
- **Animations & Shadows:** Defines custom keyframes for animations (`ripple`, `orbit`) and a specific shadow for input elements.
- **Global Resets:** Applies basic resets for `box-sizing` and `scroll-behavior`.

## CSS Variables

This file defines numerous CSS variables, categorized as follows:

**Core Colors (HSL format):**

- `--background`: Primary background color.
- `--foreground`: Primary text color.
- `--primary`: Primary accent color.
- `--primary-foreground`: Foreground color for primary elements.
- `--muted`: Muted background color.
- `--muted-foreground`: Muted text color.
- `--border`: Border color.
- `--accent`: Accent color.
- `--card`: Card background color.

**Auth Component Tokens:**

- `--skeleton`: Color for skeleton loaders.
- `--btn-border`: Border color for buttons.
- `--input`: Input field background color.
- `--radius`: General border radius.

**shadcn UI Tokens:**

- `--ring`: Ring color (often used for focus states).
- `--popover`: Popover background color.
- `--popover-foreground`: Popover text color.
- `--secondary`: Secondary accent color.
- `--secondary-foreground`: Foreground color for secondary elements.
- `--destructive`: Destructive action color.
- `--destructive-foreground`: Foreground color for destructive elements.

**Typography:**

- `--font-sans`: Sans-serif font stack.
- `--font-mono`: Monospace font stack.

**Animations:**

- `--animate-ripple`: Defines the `ripple` animation.
- `--animate-orbit`: Defines the `orbit` animation, configurable via `--duration` and `--radius`.

**Shadows:**

- `--shadow-input`: Custom shadow applied to input fields.

## Key Styles

- `*`: Sets `box-sizing: border-box;` globally.
- `html`: Enables smooth scrolling (`scroll-behavior: smooth;`).
- `body`: Applies the global background and foreground colors, and sets the default sans-serif font.
- `.g-button`: Styles buttons with a defined border radius and button border color.

## Animations

- `@keyframes ripple`: Creates a pulsating effect.
- `@keyframes orbit`: Creates a circular orbiting motion, dependent on `--radius` and `--duration` variables.

## Usage Example

This file is typically imported at the top level of the application (e.g., in `app/layout.tsx` or `app/page.tsx`) to apply the defined styles globally.

```typescript
// Example in app/layout.tsx or similar
import './globals.css';

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body className="bg-background text-foreground font-sans">
        {children}
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}
```

This example shows how the CSS variables defined in `globals.css` (like `background` and `foreground`) are used by Tailwind CSS classes to style the `body` element.
